_comment: Tier-2 Layer-F companion: inverted-gate fixture. Initially caught 3 known-broken stokes templates (skfem/ngsolve/fenics) on 2026-06-01. ngsolve was fixed in commit 6ffff60 (free.Clear(V.ndof) pressure pin) and moved to main Layer F. skfem was fixed in this iteration (MeshTri + intorder=4 + pressure pin + driven-cavity BC) and also moved to main Layer F. fenics stokes still ships a broken XDMFFile.write_function path on sol.sub(0).collapse() (task #28). The fixture also asserts the FAILURE MODE matches the documented token — a partial fix that changes the error class but doesn't fully repair the template trips wrong_failure_mode_count.
